message:
feat(animation): add Timeline multi-event scheduler (bd-1i67.1)

Timeline schedules multiple Animation events at specified offsets with
looping, pause/resume, seek, and label-based navigation. Implements
the Animation trait itself (value = progress 0.0-1.0). Converts
animation.rs to animation/ module directory. 19 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
